title: Colgate Kids Toothpaste Multipack 0-2 Years – Gentle Milk Teeth Toothpaste – Contains Dentist-Recommended Level of Fluoride – 0% Artificial colourants, Flavours and sweeteners (Pack of 4)

features: LOOKS AFTER FIRST SMILES: Our milk teeth toothpaste nurtures your baby's teeth for big, bright smiles
STRAWBERRY FLAVOUR: Our kids strawberry toothpaste has a delicate flavour your little one will love
GENTLE ON THEIR ENAMEL: Our kids toothpaste 0-2 years helps to gently protect your baby’s naturally thinner, softer enamel
RECOMMENDED FLUORIDE LEVEL: Our specially formulated kids toothpaste is made with the dentist-recommended level of fluoride to help protect little mouths
0% ARTIFICIAL SWEETENERS: Our gentle children's toothpaste is made with 0% artificial colourants, flavours and sweeteners
CARES FOR MILK TEETH: Our gentle formula is specially designed to care for your baby's new milk teeth
description: Product Description Nurture your baby’s first smiles into big, bright grins with our Colgate Kids 0-2 Years Toothpaste Multipack. Featuring a delicious strawberry flavour your little one will love, our kids toothpaste is specially designed to protect their precious milk teeth. Formulated with the dentist-recommended level of fluoride, our four-pack of children’s toothpaste gently looks after their little mouths and is made with 0% artificial colourants, flavours and sweeteners, so you can rest easy knowing that you’re giving your baby’s first teeth the care they deserve. What’s more, our milk teeth toothpaste 0-2 has a gentle formula that’s specially designed to protect your baby’s naturally thinner, softer enamel, taking care of their tiny teeth as they grow. Encourage a lifetime of happy, healthy smiles with our kids toothpaste 0-2 years. Ingredients INGREDIENTS: Glycerin, Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Xylitol, Lauryl Glucoside, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Cellulose Gum, Benzyl Alcohol, Aroma, Sodium Fluoride, Stevia Rebaudiana Extract, Rebaudioside A, Maltodextrin. Contains: Sodium Fluoride Total Fluoride content: 1000 ppm Directions "Toothpaste directions for use: Brush your children's teeth twice a day. Parents should supervise daily tooth brushing. Ensure children spit out after tooth brushing to minimise swallowing and avoid rinsing with water. Children of 6 years and younger: use a pea sized amount for supervised brushing to minimise swallowing. In case of intake of fluoride from other sources consult a dentist or doctor. Contains: Sodium Fluoride 1000 ppm F⁻ Made in Poland " Safety Warning use a pea sized amount for supervised brushing to minimize swallowing.In case of intake of fluoride from other sources consult a dentist or doctor. See more
